description: Policy for comparison-page selection. A comparison page must help a buyer choose between tools for the same job, not force unrelated AI products into a fake versus page.
default_rule: Auto-select only pairs that share the same primary category. Primary-secondary overlap, secondary-secondary overlap, and broad tier-one cross-category pairs are review-only and must not become published comparison pages.

blocked_pairs.reason: Same primary category, but different buyer jobs or workflows. Deleted as a false-vs comparison on 2026-06-21.
